feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Manufacturing Integration and Intelligence
feed.subtitle: SAP Manufacturing Integration and Intelligence Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Document transfer from RCM to Onboarding 2.0
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to transfer the documents uploaded by the candidate in RCM to the review new-hire data page of onboarding 2.0 through CPI. Can anyone help if you have already achieved a solution by this kind of integration?

Regards,

Roma

entry.title: SAP MII How insert data to MDO throught illuminator
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am trying pass arguments to my MDO throught illuminator. I create link like this:
http://<server>:<port>/XMII/Illuminator?server=MDOConnector&Mode=Insert&MDO=Project%2FMIIOBJ%2FMDOTest&Col1=Value1&Col2=Value2.

When I execute this link I recieve message in my browser that "Command Query Successful". After this when I check MDO in workbench I can see that It looks like this:

Why I can't see my values? Do I need to change anything in permissions?

Is there any different option to dynamically push data to MDO?

entry.title: MII BLS Transactions for Merging PDF's
entry.content:
Hi All,

I've a requirement in BLS Transaction of MII where I am running a Repeater and getting multiple PDF's and saving it in the server. Now, I want to merge the PDFs into one PDF as it is related to one single delivery.

As per the solution provided for the question asked in the attached link, it is only possible to convert into an iframe and viewing like a document in a webpage.

But as per my requirement that pdf should be downloaded and signed by end user. I think the signature part is not possible using this iframe concept PDFs.

Can someone please suggest how to merge multiple pdfs in the transaction level whether with saving/without saving.

Note: PDF I've designed using the ADLC and converting it into the base64 encoding using ADS Printing block.
Solved: MII transaction to combine multiple pdf's from con... - SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MII does not automatically create the Authorization header with the informed credential
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Has anyone ever experienced this?
I want to make an HTTP Post using Basic Authentication.
But it seems that SAP MII does not automatically create the Authorization header with the informed credential.

When I send the header with the credential, everything works. But I can't do it this way, because I can't have access to the password that is entered in the SAP MII Credential Store.

Does anyone have any clues on how to resolve this?

entry.title: unable to delete component from production order after running COCM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have assigned OCM profile in material master.Component deleted from BOM with change number.

Then executed COCM with that change number.It executed successfully.

But that component in production order updated with deletion indicator.That component is not removed from that order. Could you guide how to fix that.

Please note that production order is in released status.GR is not yet done.

entry.title: Korean language in SAP MII
entry.content:
Hello All,

We need one help on adding Korean language in SAP MII. Currently Korean language not showing in MII  15.1 portal. How to add / enable it and also how to add it in bundle properties creation?

Thanks,

Senthil

entry.title: RFC and BAPIs Working Slow at MII Workbench
entry.content:
Hello community,

We're using MII Workbench 15.2.3.0 at our company. We're trying to send production confirmation with using BAPI_REPMANCONF1_CREATE_MTS to SAP from MII workbench. As you can see in the Appendix, we started with an Action block (Sequence95 - start_2) and in that we added our SAP server connection parameters.

Then in Sequence96 - SAP_JCo_Function_0, we used BAPI_REPMANCONF1_CREATE_MTS and filled the request columns with our values. Then used BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT at Sequence97-SAP_JCo_Function_1.

We also used RFC at Sequence_107 in the same transaction.

When we run this transaction, it works but it works really slow. For sending one record to SAP from MII, it takes 10 seconds approximately. We have to send 100 records in like 5 minutes so this is not good for us. Is there any way to speeding up this RFC / BAPI processes ? Is MII Workbench limiting us ?

Edit : After some researching, running the BAPI_REPMANCONF1_CREATE_MTS synchronously is the main problem I guess. But when I run it Asynchronously, production record for that material cannot be seen in MB51 area. And I have to match the Confirmation code which I receive from the BAPI_REPMANCONF1_CREATE_MTS's response for all sent production records . Is there any way to decrease the running time of BAPI's when running it synchronously ?

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Issue | SAP Digital Manufacturing | Error in integration message dashboard | Order Status Sync (RMES
entry.content:
Dear members ,

We are facing an integration issue while releasing the order in SAP DM.By any chance has anyone else faced the similar issue. We are using the neo environment for integration.

Attaching the screenshot of the error. 

SAP Digital Manufacturing , @ManoelCosta  

 

Regards

Ashwin

entry.title: How can we give regular maintenance for the car which we sold to customer.
entry.content:
I produced a material and sent to customer. Now I have to provide regular service to the sold part.
How can I monitor the service for the sold product. Consider the product as Car.
Do I need to use CS or PP or PM or MRO and in which scenarios

If CS how long SAP will provide support. Or is there any other new module available for handling this.

entry.title: ADS Printing failing intermittently in SAP MII
entry.content:
ADS Printing failing intermittently in SAP MII.

Receiving success from ADS printing but there are no prints physically.

Also, it saves pdf files, but print is not receiving.

Printer is also added at OS level.

entry.title: How to hide transactions in MII?
entry.content:
Dear community

At a project with MII, I've seen that it's possible to hide transactions in a way that they cannot be viewed in the workbench but still be used through http requests.

How do you do this? Is this a parameter somewhere, is this with roles?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to move all stock to Quarantine or scrap if we have new revision
entry.content:
Here the business is using ECN and they do revision of materials. If they create a new revision with ECN for one material then the stock of the old revision is to be scrapped or moved to a quarantine storage location. Is there any easy way to do this in background in standard?

Example: I got an iPhone 15. Later I got a new iPhone 16. Now I would like to scrap or move the iphone 15 to quarantine to do rework and convert it to iPhone 16.

Also is there any ongoing production order going on for iPhone 15, I have to hold it and make the change then and there itself.

Any Idea?

entry.title: Effectivity Parameter definition is incorrect
entry.content:
I am Trying PEO. But while creating the effectivity parameter getting the below issue.

SIMG - Production - Manufacturing for Production Engineering and Operations - Cross-Applications - Unitized Product - Configure Parameters for Product Unitization

In Effectivity types I am using the below.

SIMG - Cross-Application Components - Engineering Change Management - Parameter Effectivity - Define Effectivity Types

What is the error in configs?

entry.title: 'Automatic GR' from SFC complete in Order POD is not updated to ERP(hana cloud)
entry.content:
Dear,

This question is regarding to an issue in SAP Digital Manufacturing(DM) which has been integrated with HANA Cloud ERP.

Before begin, we can see a SAP Help document that says, 'Automatic GR' is proceeded when a SFC is completed; and I have experimented it works.

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/creating-goods-receipt?locale=en-US

The problem was appeared when I monitored Integration Message Dashboard app in DM. There were not any rows about Auto GR. It means Auto GR was not being updated to ERP. Of course, other GR Postings, which are manually posted in Order POD or Posting Report POD, are appeared well in the dashboard.

Is Auto GR only for in DM? If a integrated environment user will complete a SFC, should he manually post GR before complete? If the problem is not solved, when missing positing GR before complete, we have to post adding GR quantity at least 1 to Automatically generated quantity(same to ordered qty); that might be a wrong qty.

I am afraid that my knowledge and insights are not enough, that is why I am writing this question.

Thank you in advance for sharing your knowledge and advising a solution.

 

Kind regard,

Wonpyo

entry.title: Capacity Planning Production Order should not release if work center capacity exceeds.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am working on public cloud and need to restrict the production order release if work center capacity exceeds (I have already maintained checking control configuration) and also it will be helpful if you can share capacity evaluation & leveling public cloud document link. 

Regards,

Tejas P.

entry.title: PCO Performance issue while configuring Multi Destination systems
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have PCO 15.4 and configured with multi destination system calls.

After adding around 100 line items in one Multi destination system call, facing slowdown isuue.

Could you suggest if I am missing any settings in pco configuration.

entry.title: 50% self life materials to be not considered for sales but it can be used for production
entry.content:
I have spare parts sold and used as Bom components for production.

each material have self life

if the self life got expired 50% then it should not be considered for sales. New receipts to be created in Mrp. But for production the 50% expired material can be used and considered for Mrp

Is there any standard way to achieve this

entry.title: Blocked Transactions SAP ME / HANA
entry.content:
Hi 

We have some problems with SAP ME and SAP MII, for a few moments, the system becomes slow

We review in the SAP Hana Cockpit tool, and we can see some Blocked Transactions, the main blockeds are following: 

We can see this top 3 queries in the tool

1.- UPDATE SFC_ROUTER SET QTY=?
WHERE HANDLE=? 

2.-SELECT MODIFIED_DATE_TIME,
START_DATE_TIME,
STRT,
HANDLE
FROM RESOURCE_TIME_LOG
WHERE RESOURCE_BO=?
AND ACTIVE=? forUPDATE 

3.- SELECT MODIFIED_DATE_TIME,
START_DATE_TIME,
HANDLE,
RESOURCE_STATE,
STRT
FROM RESOURCE_TIME_LOG
WHERE RESOURCE_BO=?
AND ACTIVE=? forUPDATE 

One question, This queries are standard?

Any idea to identify where it is executed from? 

Regards

entry.title: Lock a Production Order from Changes by an External system?
entry.content:
We are integrating S4 with our MES.

We want to allow changes to the Production Order from the time is it released to the MES, up until the time an MES operator clicks a button that says, "I've started working on this Production Order."

Is there an API call or message that the MES can send to S4 to lock the production order from further changes?

entry.title: How to get Email ID from Netweaver UME in MII
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using SAP MII 15.1. For one page, we need to show user details including Email id. From this URL, - https://server:port/XMII/Illuminator?service=admin&mode=userattriblist&Group=<user name>, we are able to get details but not Email id. 

How to get Email id also from the UME thru url?

Thanks,

Senthil
